🎖️

General Guisan and the Rütli Report

Year: 1940Historical figure: Henri Guisan

Join General Guisan on the Rütli meadow in 1940 as he rallies Switzerland to defend its freedom against all odds.

Create This Story

This personalized historical story takes your child to 1940 to witness General Henri Guisan's famous Rütli Report, where he gathered Swiss military leaders on the historic meadow to declare Switzerland's determination to resist invasion. Your child learns about courage, national unity, and standing firm in the face of overwhelming pressure.

What your child learns

Leadership, courage, Swiss WWII history, national determination.

Recommended age

7-10 years

Frequently Asked Questions

Is the historical content accurate?

Yes! The stories are carefully researched. The historical facts, dates, and key figures are accurate.

What to Expect

Historically accurate setting and details
Your child as a witness to history
Educational and entertaining

How It Works

1.

Upload a Photo

Upload a photo of your child. They become the illustrated hero of the story.

2.

Choose This Theme

Select this theme and customize the story settings to your liking.

3.

Get Your Story

Your personalized illustrated story is ready in minutes. Read online or order a printed book.
